// Code generated by goproducttype. DO NOT EDIT.
//go:build !adtgen_generate

package base

type AB[T any] struct {
	ID   T
	Name string
}

func NewAB[T any](a A[T], b B) AB[T] {
	return AB[T]{
		ID:   a.ID,
		Name: b.Name,
	}
}

func (x AB[T]) ToA() A[T] {
	return A[T]{
		ID: x.ID,
	}
}

func (x AB[T]) ToB() B {
	return B{
		Name: x.Name,
	}
}
